## Section

## Type of feedback

- [ ] Ambiguity or unclear normative language
- [ ] Missing requirement
- [ ] Incorrect or inconsistent requirement
- [ ] Proposed new feature
- [ ] Interoperability concern
- [ ] Security concern (if security-sensitive, please use private reporting — see SECURITY.md)

## Description

<!-- Describe the issue or proposal clearly. -->

<!-- If you have a concrete change in mind, describe it here. For normative changes, explain the rationale. -->
